Footer.tagline: Rent a Car — reliable car rental across Herzegovina.

About.title: Reliable car rental in the heart of Herzegovina
About.lead: MAXIMUM RENT A CAR d.o.o. was founded in April 2009. Through professional service and a high-quality, reliable fleet that we expand every day, we have built a recognisable image for our company. Our core motto is the satisfaction of every client — the main factor that drives us toward perfecting our services.
About.intro2: We are based in Međugorje, the largest religious and tourist centre not only in Bosnia and Herzegovina but in this part of Europe. Besides Međugorje, vehicles can also be collected in Mostar, at Mostar Airport, and in Čitluk, Ljubuški and Čapljina.
About.storyP1: MAXIMUM RENT A CAR d.o.o. is defined by an exceptionally high-quality fleet and friendly staff, always ready to meet every client's request. We work 365 days a year and are available to you even outside business hours.
About.storyP2: For everyone who comes to Međugorje, whether for tourism or business, our company is fully at your disposal. You can read all rental terms and other information on our website, or contact us through the contact form, where our phone numbers are also listed.

features.f1Text: We work every day of the year and accommodate you even outside business hours.
features.f2Text: Collection in Međugorje, Mostar, at Mostar Airport, and in Čitluk, Ljubuški and Čapljina.
features.f3Text: High-quality vehicles that are regularly maintained and renewed.
features.f4Text: The satisfaction of every client is the main factor behind everything we do.

About.mapText: Our head office is in Čitluk, and you can collect a vehicle at six locations across Herzegovina.
About.ctaText: Browse our fleet or get in touch — we'll be glad to help you choose.

Business.title: Long-term car rental for your business
Business.lead: Professional fleet management without burdening your balance sheet — flexible, simple, and with a predictable monthly cost.
Business.flexP1: Long-term rental is intended for all legal entities and individuals, with the goal of using a professional service to make your operations and fleet management easier. The flexibility our long-term rent a car offers is a must for most modern companies.
Business.flexP2: With long-term rental we highlight the advantage of us assuming all the financial risks that, with leasing, fall on your company. Your balance sheet is not burdened, you pay only for the number of days you use the vehicle, you keep control over expenses, and you have the guarantee that returning the vehicle before the agreed time brings no additional costs.
Business.simpleP1: If your business is seasonal, long-term rental lets you optimise costs around the periods you plan for. Unlike leasing — with no need for additional capital or financial approval — if you need more or fewer vehicles, the rental can be arranged at very short notice, without prior announcement or planning.
Business.simpleP2: Long-term rental enables minimal, planned monthly costs, defined by the monthly rental term and the agreed mileage.
Business.avgAgeLabel: Years — average age of our fleet
Business.servicesSubtitle: Everything is included in the monthly rental price — no hidden costs.
compareRows: No documentation for leasing approval or company creditworthiness assessment
Option to temporarily return the vehicle (e.g. longer absence due to work, sick leave, holidays…)
Option of early permanent return of the vehicle at no cost
Swapping the rented vehicle for another model during the rental (e.g. need for a larger or smaller vehicle)
Replacement vehicle in case of breakdown or damage
Business.ctaText: Leave your details and we'll get back to you with a personalised offer for your fleet. You can also reach us directly via WhatsApp.

Terms.title: Rental terms
Terms.lead: Transparent terms for a worry-free rental.
items: Minimum driver age is 21, with a driving licence held for over 2 years.
A valid ID/passport and driving licence are required to collect the vehicle.
The rental price includes basic insurance, BiH vignettes and unlimited mileage.
The deposit depends on the vehicle class and is fully refunded after a proper return.
The vehicle is collected and returned with a full fuel tank.
Taking the vehicle outside BiH is possible with prior notice and the right paperwork.
Free cancellation is available up to 48 hours before pick-up.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.lead: We are here for all your questions and reservations.
Contact.formLead: Enter your details and we'll reply — no need to open your email. If it's quicker for you, reach us via WhatsApp.

BusinessTeaser.title: Business rental & transfers
BusinessTeaser.body: Long-term rental with maintenance included, fleet solutions on a single invoice, and transfers to the airport and hotels.

items.q: What is the minimum rental age?
items.a: 21 years, with a driving licence held for over 2 years.

items.q: What do I need to collect the vehicle?
items.a: A valid ID or passport and a driving licence.

items.q: What's included in the rental price?
items.a: Basic insurance, BiH vignettes and unlimited mileage.
The deposit depends on the vehicle class and is fully refunded after a proper return.

items.q: Can I take the vehicle outside BiH?
items.a: Yes, with prior notice and the right paperwork.
Free cancellation is available up to 48 hours before pick-up.
